Acid.name: 強酸
Acid.description: 當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以投擲a vial of Acid以替換其中一次攻擊。. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

Bagpipes.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Bagpipes.name: 風笛

Book.name: 書
Book.description: A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks you make about that topic.

Candle.name: 蠟燭
Candle.description: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

Chain.name: 鎖鏈

Wrap Chain Check.name: 纏鏈檢定
Wrap Chain Check.target: Has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition

Chain.description: As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the &Reference[Grappled], &Reference[Incapacitated], or &Reference[Restrained] condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. If the creature’s legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Chain requires the creature to make a successful DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action. Bursting the Chain requires a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.

Flute.name: 長笛
Flute.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）

Ladder.name: 長梯
Ladder.description: A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

Map.name: 地圖
Map.description: If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks you make to find your way in the place represented on it.

Navigator's Tools.name: 領航員工具
Navigator's Tools.description:
屬性：感知

使用： Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15)

Holy Water.name: 聖水
Holy Water.description: 當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以投擲「」替換其中一次攻擊。a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

Bolts.description:
Storage: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCaseCrossbo]{Case}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAmmunitionV]{Ammunition} is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon’s description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.
Bolts.name: 弩矢

Chest.name: 箱子
Chest.description: 一個箱子可以容納12立方呎的物品。

Bullets, Firearm.description:
Storage: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPouch000000]{Pouch}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAmmunitionV]{Ammunition} is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon’s description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.
Bullets, Firearm.name: 火器子彈

Lamp.description: A Lamp burns @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{Oil} as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.
Lamp.name: 油燈

Caltrops.name: 鐵蒺藜
Caltrops.description: As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops from their bag to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Caltrops.

Glassblower's Tools.description:
屬性：智力

使用： Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.HZp69hhyNZUUCipF]{Glass Bottle}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagMagnifyingG]{Magnifying Glass}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagSpyglass100]{Spyglass}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagVial0000000]{Vial}
Glassblower's Tools.name: 玻璃匠工具

Brewer's Supplies.name: 釀酒師設備
Brewer's Supplies.description:
屬性：智力

使用： Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAntitoxin00]{Antitoxin}

Weaver's Tools.name: 織布工工具
Weaver's Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmPaddedArmo]{Padded Armor}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBasket00000]{Basket}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBedroll0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBlanket0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagClothesFine]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagNet00000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRobe0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRope0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagSack0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagString00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTent0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagClothesTrav]

Ink.description: Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.
Ink.name: 墨水

Tinker's Tools.name: 修補匠工具
Tinker's Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepMusket0000]{Musket}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepPistol0000]{Pistol}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBell0000000]{Bell}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.UkWdyJYQTfVX2cJW]{Bullseye Lantern}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagFlask000000]{Flask}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.wjHtGnd05SPdURqE]{Hooded Lantern}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHuntingTrap]{Hunting Trap}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLock0000000]{Lock}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagManacles000]{Manacles}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagMirror00000]{Mirror}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagShovel00000]{Shovel}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagSignalWhist]{Signal Whistle}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}

Spyglass.description: Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.
Spyglass.name: 望遠鏡

Mirror.description: A handheld steel Mirror is useful for personal cosmetics but also for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.
Mirror.name: Mirror

Tooled Owlbear Hide.description: An owlbear hide tooled with stellar symbols that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.
Tooled Owlbear Hide.name: 雕飾梟雄皮

Burglar's Pack.name: 竊賊套裝
Burglar's Pack.description: A Burglar’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBallBearing]{Ball Bearings}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBell0000000]{Bell}, 10 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCandle00000]{Candles}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCrowbar0000]{Crowbar}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.wjHtGnd05SPdURqE]{Hooded Lantern}, 7 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{flasks of Oil}, 5 days of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRope0000000]{Rope}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagWaterskin00]{Waterskin}.

Bedroll.name: 睡袋
Bedroll.description: A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold (see the Dungeon Master ’s Guide).

Sack.name: 麻袋
Sack.description: A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

Grappling Hook.description: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 feet of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.
Grappling Hook.name: 爪鉤

Carpenter's Tools.description:
屬性：力量

使用： Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepClub000000]{Club}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreatclub0]{Greatclub}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]{Quarterstaff}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBarrel00000]{Barrel}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagChest000000]{Chest}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLadder00000]{Ladder}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPole0000000]{Pole}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.srTRzwTfWKO5opOo]{Portable Ram}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTorch000000]{Torch}
Carpenter's Tools.name: 木匠工具

Case, Map or Scroll.description: A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.
Case, Map or Scroll.name: Case, Map or Scroll

Paper.name: 紙
Paper.description: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

Wooden staff.description:
A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]{Druidic Focus} takes one of the forms in the Druidic Focuses table and is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

This item also functions as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]{Quarterstaff}

Foundry Note

This item has been configured with the additional properties of a Quarterstaff.
Wooden staff.name: 木質法杖

Manacles.description:
As a Utilize action, you can use Manacles to bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the &Reference[Grappled], &Reference[Incapacitated], or &Reference[Restrained] condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. While bound, a creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls, and the creature is Restrained if the Manacles are attached to a chain or hook that is fixed in place. Escaping the Manacles requires a successful DC 20 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check as an action. Bursting them requires a successful DC 25 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.

Each set of Manacles comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves’ Tools to pick the Manacles’ lock with a successful [[/tool thief dex 15]] check.
Manacles.name: 鐐銬

Lute.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Lute.name: 魯特琴

Magnifying Glass.description: A Magnifying Glass grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Lighting a fire with a Magnifying Glass requires light as bright as sunlight to focus, tinder to ignite, and about 5 minutes for the fire to ignite.
Magnifying Glass.name: 放大鏡

Rations.name: 口糧
Rations.description: Rations consist of travel-ready food, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. See &Reference[Malnutrition] in the rules glossary for the risks of not eating.

Thieves' Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15)
Thieves' Tools.name: 盜賊工具

Lantern, Bullseye.description: A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.
Lantern, Bullseye.name: Lantern, Bullseye

Blanket.description: While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold (see the Dungeon Master ’s Guide).
Blanket.name: 毛毯

Water (Pint).description: If you don’t drink sufficient water, you risk &Reference[dehydration].
Water (Pint).name: Water (Pint)

Ink Pen.description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.
Ink Pen.name: 墨水筆

Disguise Kit.name: 易容工具組
Disguise Kit.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： Apply makeup (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCostume0000]{Costume}

Shawm.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Shawm.name: 蕭姆管

Lyre.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Lyre.name: 里拉琴

Horn.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Horn.name: 號角

Forgery Kit.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else’s handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20)
Forgery Kit.name: 偽造工具組

Pan Flute.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Pan Flute.name: 排笛

Bullets, Sling.name: 投石索子彈
Bullets, Sling.description:
Storage: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPouch000000]{Pouch}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAmmunitionV]{Ammunition} is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon’s description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

Backpack.name: 背包
Backpack.description: A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

Hunting Trap.name: 狩獵陷阱
Hunting Trap.description: As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap, which is a sawtooth steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate in the center. The trap is affixed by a heavy chain to an immobile object, such as a tree or a spike driven into the ground. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn. Thereafter, until the creature breaks free of the trap, its movement is limited by the length of the chain (typically 3 feet). A creature can use its action to make a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success. Each failed check deals [[/damage 1 type=piercing]] damage to the trapped creature.

Smith's Tools.name: 鐵匠工具
Smith's Tools.description:
屬性：力量

使用： Pry open a door or container (DC 20)

製作： Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBallBearing]{Ball Bearings}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBucket00000]{Bucket}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCaltrops000]{Caltrops}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagChain000000]{Chain}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCrowbar0000]{Crowbar}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoBulletsFir]{Firearm Bullets}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagGrapplingHo]{Grappling Hook}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.M8xM8BLK4tpUayEE]{Iron Pot}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagSpikesIron0]{Iron Spikes}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoBulletsSli]{Sling Bullets}

Parchment.description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.
Parchment.name: 羊皮紙

Woodcarver's Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepClub000000]{Club}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreatclub0]{Greatclub}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]{Quarterstaff}, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]{Arrows}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoBolts00000]{Bolts}, Druidic Focus, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInkPen00000]{Ink Pen}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoNeedles000]{Needles}
Woodcarver's Tools.name: 木雕工具

Ball Bearings.description:
As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings from their pouch. They spread to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the &Reference[Prone] condition. It takes 10 minutes to recover the Ball Bearings.

Foundry Note

The Recover Ball Bearings activity grants another use of this item.
Ball Bearings.name: 滾珠

Barrel.description: A Barrel holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.
Barrel.name: 木桶

Healer's Kit.description: A Healer’s Kit has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one of its uses to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.
Healer's Kit.name: 醫療工具組

Cook's Utensils.name: 廚師炊具
Cook's Utensils.description:
屬性：感知

使用： Improve food’s flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}

Alchemist's Fire.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist’s Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take [[/damage 1d4 type=fire]] damage and start &Reference[burning].
Alchemist's Fire.name: 熾火膠

Yew wand.name: 紫杉魔杖
Yew wand.description: A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]{Druidic Focus} takes one of the forms in the Druidic Focuses table and is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

Stone Tablet.name: 石板
Stone Tablet.description: A stone tablet with fine holes drilled through it that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.

Rod.description: An @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.
Rod.name: 權杖

Bullseye Lantern.description: 一盞牛眼提燈散發出60呎錐形的明亮光照以及再延伸60呎的微光光照。一旦被點亮，每一扁瓶（1品脫）的燈油都可以讓它燃燒持續6小時。
Bullseye Lantern.name: 牛眼提燈

Poison, Basic.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can use a vial of Basic Poison to coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Once applied, the poison retains potency for 1 minute or until its damage is dealt, whichever comes first.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a roll for the Poison damage.
Poison, Basic.name: 基礎毒藥

Emblem.description:
Usage Requirement: Borne on fabric or a Shield

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]{Holy Symbol} takes one of the forms in the Holy Symbol table and is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus.
Emblem.name: 徽章

Mason's Tools.name: 石匠工具
Mason's Tools.description:
屬性：力量

使用： Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBlockandTac]{Block and Tackle}

Waterskin.description: A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints. If you don’t drink sufficient water, you risk &Reference[dehydration].
Waterskin.name: 水袋

Amulet.name: 護符
Amulet.description:
Usage Requirement: Worn or held

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]{Holy Symbol} takes one of the forms in the Holy Symbol table and is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus.

Clothes, Traveler's.description: Traveler’s Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.
Clothes, Traveler's.name: 旅行者服裝

Component Pouch.description: 材料包是一個防水的腰包，裝著所有你法術需要的免費材料。
Component Pouch.name: 材料包

Pot, Iron.description: An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.
Pot, Iron.name: Pot, Iron

Antitoxin.description: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.
Antitoxin.name: 解毒劑

Priest's Pack.description: A Priest’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBlanket0000]{Blanket}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolyWater00]{Holy Water}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLamp0000000]{Lamp}, 7 days of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRobe0000000]{Robe}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}.
Priest's Pack.name: 祭司套裝

Herbalism Kit.description:
屬性：智力

使用： Identify a plant (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAntitoxin00]{Antitoxin}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCandle00000]{Candle}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHealersKit0]{Healer’s Kit}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPotionofHea]{Potion of Healing}
Herbalism Kit.name: 藥草師工具組

Shovel.name: 鏟子
Shovel.description: Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

Tinderbox.description: A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.
Tinderbox.name: 打火匣

Diplomat's Pack.name: 大使套裝
Diplomat's Pack.description: A Diplomat’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagChest000000]{Chest}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.FqFmdzIBUSxFKKfi]{Fine Clothes}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInk00000000]{Ink}, 5 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInkPen00000]{Ink Pens}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLamp0000000]{Lamp}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.5mIeX824uMklU3xq]{Map or Scroll Cases}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{flasks of Oil}, 5 sheets of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPaper000000]{Paper}, 5 sheets of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagParchment00]{Parchment}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPerfume0000]{Perfume}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}.

Lantern, Hooded.description: A Hooded Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.
Lantern, Hooded.name: Lantern, Hooded

Tent.name: 帳篷
Tent.description: 一個帳篷可以睡兩個小型或中型的生物。

Engraved Crystal.name: 雕刻水晶
Engraved Crystal.description: A crystal engraved with starry patterns that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.

Arrows.name: 箭矢
Arrows.description:
Storage: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]{Quiver}

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagAmmunitionV]{Ammunition} is required by a weapon that has the Ammunition property. A weapon’s description specifies the type of ammunition used by the weapon. The Ammunition table lists the different types and the amount you get when you buy them. The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

Dice.name: 骰子
Dice.description:
屬性：感知

使用：辨別某人是否作弊（DC 10），或贏得這場遊戲（DC 20）

Block and Tackle.description: A Block and Tackle allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.
Block and Tackle.name: 滑輪組

Signal Whistle.name: 訊號哨
Signal Whistle.description: When blown as a Utilize action, a Signal Whistle produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

Druidic Focus (Varies).description:
A Druidic Focus takes one of the forms in the Druidic Focuses table and is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.

Druidic Focuses
FocusWeightCost

Drum.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）
Drum.name: 鼓

Crystal.description: An @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.
Crystal.name: 水晶

Bottle, Glass.description: 一個玻璃瓶可以容納1½品脫的液體。
Bottle, Glass.name: 玻璃瓶

Pouch.description: A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.
Pouch.name: 囊袋

Rope.description:
As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope if you succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. The Rope can be burst with a successful DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

You can bind an unwilling creature with the Rope only if the creature has the &Reference[Grappled], &Reference[Incapacitated], or &Reference[Restrained] condition. If the creature’s legs are bound, the creature has the Restrained condition until it escapes. Escaping the Rope requires the creature to make a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check as an action.
Rope.name: 繩索

Spell Scroll, Level 1.name: 1環法術卷軸
Spell Scroll, Level 1.description:
A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCantripScro]{Spell Scroll (Cantrip)} or Spell Scroll (Level 1) is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll’s creator. If the spell is on your class’s spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components.

If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll, the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

Dulcimer.name: 揚琴
Dulcimer.description:
屬性： 魅力

使用： 演奏熟悉的旋律（DC 10）或即興演唱一曲（DC 15）

Bucket.name: 水桶
Bucket.description: 一個水桶可以容納½立方呎的固體。

Map or Scroll Case.description: 這款圓柱形皮套最多可容納十捲紙或五卷羊皮紙。
Map or Scroll Case.name: 地圖或卷軸筒

Constellations Scroll.description: A scroll bearing depictions of constellations that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.
Constellations Scroll.name: 星座卷軸

Poisoner's Kit.description:
屬性：智力

使用： Detect a poisoned object (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPoisonBasic]{Basic Poison}
Poisoner's Kit.name: 製毒工具組

Net.description:
當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以投擲「」替換其中一次攻擊。a Net. Target a creature you can see within 15 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or have the &Reference[Restrained] condition until it escapes. The target succeeds automatically if it is Huge or larger.

To escape, the target or a creature within 5 feet of it must take an action to make a [[/skill ath 10]] check, freeing the Restrained creature on a success. Destroying the Net (AC 10; 5 HP; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage) also frees the target, ending the effect.
Net.name: 捕網

Wand.description: An @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.
Wand.name: 魔杖

Hooded Lantern.name: 附蓋提燈
Hooded Lantern.description: 一盞附蓋提燈散發出30呎半徑的明亮光照以及再延伸30呎的微光光照。一旦被點亮，每一扁瓶（1品脫）的燈油都可以讓它燃燒持續6小時。以一個動作，你可以降下燈蓋，將光照減弱為5呎半徑的微光光照。

Sprig of mistletoe.description: A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]{Druidic Focus} takes one of the forms in the Druidic Focuses table and is carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus.
Sprig of mistletoe.name: 槲寄生枝

Orb.description: An @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.
Orb.name: 法球

Lock.description: A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbtulThievesToo]{Thieves’ Tools} to pick this Lock with a successful [[/tool thief dex 15]] check.
Lock.name: 鎖

Bell.description: When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.
Bell.name: 鈴鐺

Potion of Healing.name: 治療藥水
Potion of Healing.description: This potion is a magic item. As a Bonus Action, you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

Case, Crossbow Bolt.name: 弩矢匣
Case, Crossbow Bolt.description: 一個弩箭匣可容納 20 支弩矢。

The table also lists the item that is typically used to store each type; storage must be bought separately.

Fine Clothes.name: 高級服裝
Fine Clothes.description: Set of clothes designed specifically to be expensive and show it.

Shield.name: 盾牌
Shield.description: You gain the Armor Class benefit of a Shield only if you have training with it.

Pole.description: A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump, you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.
Pole.name: 長桿

Scholar's Pack.description: A Scholar’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBook0000000]{Book}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInk00000000]{Ink}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInkPen00000]{Ink Pen}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLamp0000000]{Lamp}, 10 flasks of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{Oil}, 10 sheets of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagParchment00]{Parchment}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}.

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagMap00000000]{Map}

An @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]{Arcane Focus} is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus.

This item also functions as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]{Quarterstaff}

Ram, Portable.description: You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you Advantage on this check.
Ram, Portable.name: Ram, Portable

Cobbler's Tools.name: 鞋匠工具
Cobbler's Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer’s next敏捷 (Acrobatics) check (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagClimbersKit]{Climber’s Kit}

Climber's Kit.name: 攀爬工具組
Climber's Kit.description: A Climber’s Kit includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can use the Climber’s Kit to anchor yourself; when you do, you can’t fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point, and you can’t move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action.

Spell Scroll, Cantrip.name: 戲法法術卷軸
Spell Scroll, Cantrip.description:
A Spell Scroll (Cantrip) or @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagSpellScroll]{Spell Scroll (Level 1)} is a magic item that bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll’s creator. If the spell is on your class’s spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components.

If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll, the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

Explorer's Pack.name: 探索者套裝
Explorer's Pack.description: An Explorer’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBedroll0000]、2 flasks of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{Oil}, 10 days of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRope0000000]{Rope}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}, 10 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTorch000000]{Torches}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagWaterskin00]{Waterskin}.

Costume.description: 穿著戲服時，你在模仿他人或you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.
Costume.name: 戲服

Potter's Tools.description:
屬性：智力 Weight: 3 lb.

使用： Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagJug00000000]{Jug}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagLamp0000000]{Lamp}
Potter's Tools.name: 陶匠工具

Ebony-bound Atlas.description: A collection of maps bound in an ebony cover that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.
Ebony-bound Atlas.name: Ebony-bound Atlas

Jeweler's Tools.description:
屬性：智力

使用： Discern a gem’s value (DC 15)

製作： Arcane Focus, Holy Symbol
Jeweler's Tools.name: 珠寶匠工具

Oil.name: 油
Oil.description:
You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below.

Dousing a Creature or an Object. 當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以投擲「」替換其中一次攻擊。an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or be covered in oil. If the target takes Fire damage before the oil dries (after 1 minute), the target takes an extra [[/damage 5 type=fire]] damage from burning oil.

Dousing a Space. You can take the Utilize action to pour an Oil flask on level ground to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. If lit, the oil burns until the end of the turn 2 rounds from when the oil was lit (or 12 seconds) and deals 5 Fire damage to any creature that enters the area or ends its turn there. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

Fuel. Oil serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. That duration doesn’t need to be consecutive; you can extinguish the burning Oil (as a Utilize action) and rekindle it again until it has burned for a total of 6 hours.

Robe.description: A Robe has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.
Robe.name: 法袍

Playing Cards.description:
屬性：感知

使用：辨別某人是否作弊（DC 10），或贏得這場遊戲（DC 20）
Playing Cards.name: 撲克牌

Vial.description: 一個小瓶可以容納最多4盎司的液體。
Vial.name: 小瓶

String.description: String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

Entertainer's Pack.name: 表演家套裝
Entertainer's Pack.description: An Entertainer’s Pack contains the following items: @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBedroll0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBell0000000]{Bell}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.UkWdyJYQTfVX2cJW]、3 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCostume0000]{Costumes}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagMirror00000]{Mirror}, 8 flasks of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagOil00000000]{Oil}, 9 days of @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRations0000]{Rations}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagTinderbox00]{Tinderbox}, and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagWaterskin00]{Waterskin}.

Basket.name: 籃子
Basket.description: 一個籃子可以容納2立方呎或40磅重的裝備。

Calligrapher's Supplies.name: 書法家設備
Calligrapher's Supplies.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagInk00000000]{Ink}, Spell Scroll

Reliquary.name: 聖物匣
Reliquary.description:
Usage Requirement: Held

A @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]{Holy Symbol} takes one of the forms in the Holy Symbol table and is bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus.

Crowbar.description: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar’s leverage can be applied.
Crowbar.name: 撬棍

Clothes, Fine.name: 高級服裝
Clothes, Fine.description: Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

Leatherworker's Tools.name: 皮匠工具
Leatherworker's Tools.description:
屬性：敏捷

使用： Add a design to a leather item (DC 10)

製作： @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSling00000]{Sling}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepWhip000000]{Whip}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmHideArmor0]{Hide Armor}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]{Leather Armor}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]{Studded Leather Armor}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBackpack000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.eJtPBiZtr2pp6ynt]{Crossbow Bolt Case}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagCaseMaporSc]{Map or Scroll Case}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagParchment00]{Parchment}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPouch000000]{Pouch}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]{Quiver}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagWaterskin00]{Waterskin}

Spikes, Iron.description: Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can use a blunt object, such as a Light Hammer, to hammer a spike into wood, earth, or a similar material. You can do so to jam a door shut or to then tie a Rope or Chain to the Spike.
Spikes, Iron.name: Spikes, Iron

Flask.name: 扁瓶
Flask.description: 一個扁瓶可以容納1品脫的液體。

Etched Glass Disk.description: A glass disk etched with constellations that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by Circle of the Star Druids. It is a Tiny object.
Etched Glass Disk.name: Etched Glass Disk
